commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway `hasActiveRun` projection to transcript `session.message` snapshots and makes WebChat skip history reloads while that marker is true.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +125. Total +151 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. in source: current main can broadcast a terminal persisted row without active-run proof before terminal delivery clears the run, and the supplied recordings show real WebChat before/after behavior. I did not run a fresh packaged browser E2E in this read-only review.
